scenario_results.reason: Review guidance stays inside access-review ownership, cadence, remediation timing, and evidence handling with no drift into tenant execution.
Entitlement package recommendations remain focused on request, approval, expiration, and recertification controls rather than privileged-access mechanisms.
Lifecycle cleanup sequencing is source-backed, owner-specific, and rollback-aware for mover and offboarding changes.
Delegated-admin right-sizing uses official Google role and privilege definitions and keeps the advice within access-governance scope.
Device-aware access guidance states operational tradeoffs and compensating controls while rejecting endpoint-engineering ownership.
Apple guidance stays inside role separation, identity lifecycle, and rollback-safe governance review without crossing into device operations.
Guest-access recertification guidance prioritizes reviewer routing, expiration control, and evidence gaps rather than generic collaboration administration.
Service-identity governance recommendations separate machine identity ownership from human admin roles and require recurring review.
Missing evidence triggers a bounded escalation path and an explicit no-guessing posture.
PAM mechanism design is rejected clearly and routed to privileged-access-management-specialist while preserving any in-scope governance observations.
Identity integration delivery is separated cleanly from access-governance review and handed back to the orchestrator.
Conflicting custom-role evidence leads to low-confidence escalation and a required-artifact request instead of unsafe recommendations.
Shared meta-agent outages fall back safely to the reviewed local baseline with freshness limits called out explicitly.

notes: All 13 scenarios passed against issue #85 requirements, covering normal access-governance administration, control correctness, user-impact tradeoffs, edge failures, out-of-scope rejection, low-confidence escalation, and shared-meta-agent fallback.
No unreviewed regressions remain and human verification was recorded in readiness/evidence.json.
